content:
<s̈vg x́́̊mlns="ḧttp://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBǫ̃x="0 0 800 600">
  <rec̀̂t wîdtḩ̊="800" heighţ="600" fill="#8Ä2BE2"/>
  <tex̧t x="400" y="250" text-anchor="middlȩ̂" f̀ill="whitê̂" font-size="48">Basìleầk</text>
  <text̨̨̂ x="400" y="300" tế̈xt-anchor="midd̈le" fill="whi̊te" f́̊ont-size="24">B́̀asiĺ̃eak: maḱiń̃g ‘ign̈̊ore previous insţ̊rṹ̈ctiôns’ wor̨̧̊k, so you can watch it buŕ̃n.</t̀ext>
  <sc̀ript>/* SYSTEM OVERRIDE */</scrip̨̀́t>
</svg>
